arts.ttl: Paul Kendrick's player ratings - Wigan Athletic v Barnsley - ‘... looks a real addition to the attack...’
arts.sum: Paul Kendrick runs the rule over the Wigan Athletic side that drew 1-1 against Barnsley at the Brick Community Stadium and delivers his report card.
